notes: Source of 2x hub motors + 36V battery + controller + charger. CONFIRM mainboard is STM32F103 or GD32F103 before buying so FOC firmware works (see firmware-compatibility wiki in notes)
Swivel (not rigid) so it can pivot; pick a set rated well above full loaded weight
ESP-WROOM-32; Bluetooth Classic for Wiimote + UART out. Spare in the 2-pack
MUST accept >42V in (36V pack peaks at 42V charged). This 8-60V module is safe; a 4-38V module is NOT
On battery positive lead; size fuse to controller draw (~30-40A)
Wire the NC contact into the controller ENABLE / dead-man line (10A button can't break full motor current directly)
No bare li-ion leads; pull-apart for transport/charging
Nunchuk stick gives analog throttle option. Buy genuine Nintendo if pairing is flaky
Mount axle + casters + seat; size to can inner diameter
Grade-appropriate bolts; thread-lock the wheel mounts
Keep center of gravity low; sit
Cover spokes; cut an eye-level visibility band
